title: neottia latilabra
intro: Neottia latilabra, also known as the yellow ladies' tresses, is a type of orchid native to North America, characterized by its yellow and greenish flowers arranged in a spiral pattern. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Neottia latilabra include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
